testName: Multiple Values Files with Default Values

standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-values-with-defaults/templates/values-display.yaml
all-values: |
    appName: chart-default
    chartOnlyValue: exists-only-in-chart
    database:
      host: chart-default-db
      port: 5432
      username: chart_user
    enabled: false
    environment: default
    replicas: 1
    resources:
      limits:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 256Mi
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi

standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-values-with-defaults/templates/values-display.yaml
all-values: |
    appName: external-default
    chartOnlyValue: exists-only-in-chart
    database:
      host: prod-db.example.com
      name: external_db
      password: secure_prod_password
      port: 5433
      username: prod_user
    enabled: true
    environment: production
    externalOnlyValue: exists-only-in-external
    replicas: 10
    resources:
      limits:
        cpu: 2000m
        memory: 2Gi
      requests:
        cpu: 1000m
        memory: 1Gi
